title: How to Catch Men
writer: Bobby E. Lüthge, Max Reimann, Otto Schwartz
actors: Franciska Gaal, Paul Hörbiger, Paul Heidemann
plot: When Ilona visits her married friend Otti, she is just delighted to discover that the man she likes is not other than Otti's brother-in-law, Paul. As he is in need of a maid, she disguises herself as such to try to enamour him.
